rows.label: tlk41200122_01_msg0002
rows.name:
Armu are suuuuper cute and adorable
and sweet and pretty animals!

rows.label: tlk41200122_01_msg0003
rows.name:
They differ by country, but Gulan Armu
are gentle and calm; their slow
movements are irresistible!

rows.label: tlk41200122_01_msg0004
rows.name:
When traveling, they're hard workers,
doing anything from carrying luggage
to giving you a ride!

rows.label: tlk41200122_01_msg0005
rows.name:
So?! Did you learn a
looooot about Armu?
